title: athlete-guardian — retention windows
description: Active + pending + disputed guardians retain for the lifetime of the parent Athlete. Revoked guardians retain 7 years for audit (compliance-critical). Soft-deleted guardians: 7-year retention from deleted_at then hard-purge. Athlete hard-delete cascades to all guardian rows regardless of retention state.
compliance_regimes_referenced: soc2 CC6.3 — segregation of duties audit trail

purge.notes: Revoked guardians retain the row + revoke_reason for compliance audit. Regulatory investigations may look back years.

cross_reference: TenantErased cascades hard-delete of every AthleteGuardian row via FK CASCADE. Audit rows survive per the audit module's outlives-source design.
Athlete hard-delete cascades all guardian rows regardless of their own retention state — the guardian row without an athlete is meaningless.
